title: Equipment
description: Sets the Equipment table to use for this Entity.

drop_chance.title: Drop Chance
drop_chance.description: The chance to drop the equipped item (0.0 to 1.0).

slot_drop_chance.title: Slot Drop Chance
slot_drop_chance.description: A list of slots with the chance to drop an equipped item from that slot. Can be an array of slot name strings or an array of objects with slot and drop_chance properties.

table.title: Table
table.description: The file path to the equipment table, relative to the behavior pack's root.
